text.title: rag-architecture Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to produce a RAG architecture decision record.

step.name: gather-constraints
step.action: Collect size, type, change rate, latency SLA, cost budget, compliance.

step.name: decide-RAG-vs-alternatives
step.action: Apply decision tree: long-context vs fine-tune vs RAG.
step.decision-gate: If not RAG, write a one-line decision record and stop.

step.name: pick-vector-db-and-retrieval
step.action: Vector DB + hybrid vs vector + reranker.

step.name: set-quality-gates
step.action: MRR / faithfulness / latency p95 / cost-per-query numeric thresholds.

step.name: write-and-sign
step.action: Compose markdown record; owner signs and dates.
